posts.author: eahoneyball (Emily Honeyball)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to have a custom sort option in this view mode.

What are you trying to achieve

I currently have to rename the options in a dropdown column with alphabetical sorting in mind if I want groups to show up in a certain order. I would like to be able to sort in a custom order. Renaming my dropdown options impacts the clarity for those viewing the information.
